title.en: China-to-South Africa BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电池储能系统进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電池儲能系統進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against South Africa NRCS LOA scope, SANS / IEC battery and ESS standards, NRS 097 grid-connection expectations, UN 38.3 transport evidence, and installation safety checks.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电池储能系统文件与南非NRCS LOA适用范围、SANS / IEC电池及储能标准、NRS 097并网要求、UN 38.3运输证据和安装安全检查差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電池儲能系統文件與南非NRCS LOA適用範圍、SANS / IEC電池及儲能標準、NRS 097併網要求、UN 38.3運輸證據和安裝安全檢查差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS LOA scope determination, SANS conformity assessment, municipal grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current South Africa NRCS, SABS, municipal, grid, transport, fire, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS LOA适用范围裁定、SANS符合性评定、市政并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行南非NRCS、SABS、市政、电网、运输、消防及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS LOA適用範圍裁定、SANS符合性評定、市政併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行南非NRCS、SABS、市政、電網、運輸、消防及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to South Africa, do not assume the whole integrated system needs NRCS LOA unless a compulsory specification clearly captures that product or component. The practical gaps are confirming NRCS scope for regulated electrical components, mapping battery evidence to SANS / IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 expectations, preparing UN 38.3 transport documents, satisfying NRS 097 and municipal embedded-generation rules for grid connection, and providing installation and fire-safety evidence for residential and C&I projects.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口南非时，除非强制规范明确覆盖整机或部件，不应假定整个集成系统都需要NRCS LOA。实际差距包括确认受监管电气部件的NRCS适用范围，将电池证据映射到SANS / IEC 62619和IEC 62933要求，准备UN 38.3运输文件，满足NRS 097及市政分布式发电并网规则，并为户用及工商业项目提供安装和消防安全证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口南非時，除非強制規範明確覆蓋整機或部件，不應假定整個整合系統都需要NRCS LOA。實際差距包括確認受監管電氣部件的NRCS適用範圍，將電池證據映射到SANS / IEC 62619和IEC 62933要求，準備UN 38.3運輸文件，滿足NRS 097及市政分散式發電併網規則，並為戶用及工商業項目提供安裝和消防安全證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
